title: Tetris Trails
description: Adds Tetris to the game. Fight through Trials.
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BjkAyfGg5IY" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


_The structure's name:_
in code it's: **_tetris:start.building_** so when you want to locate it for example you do:
```
/locate structure tetris:start.building
```
# _General Info:_
The structure is like a mini trail chambers (with a different style), however, at the end of the structure at tetris usally spawns a tetris room, which will allow you to play tetris there.

## Spoilers:

<details>
<summary>the tetris room:</summary>
the room itself is big and it has a little tetris board infront (of where u enter it)
  
**_start/end game:_**
in the room itself you will see a chair, click it and it will start the game. the game will end once the pieces have reached about 2 blocks away from the top of the board itself

**_controls:_**
on keyboard while facing the board:
- Forward key - hard drops the piece
- Backwards key - soft drops the piece
- Left key - moves the key left
- Right key - moves the key right

on the mouse:
- Right click - rotates the piece anti clockwise
- Left click - rotates the piece clockwise


<details>
<summary>Loot and how to get score:</summary>
_**Loot:**_

Like i said before your loot at the end of the game is determined based on ur score so if u got a score between:
- 0..100 score - you will get the worst loot 
- 101..500 score - you will get the better loot
- 501..1000 score - you will get the medium loot
- 1001..1500 score - you will get the some good loot.
and if you get more than 1500 score you will get the legendary loot which gives you a wand.

**_Scores_**
whenever you hard drop a piece you get 5 score
and when you clear lines:
- for 1 line cleared - you get 20 score
- for 2 line cleared - you get 60 score
- for 3 line cleared - you get 100 score
- for 4 line cleared - you get 200 score
</details>
</details>

<details>
<summary>New Items added</summary>

<details>
<summary>T shurkien</summary>
You can get it from some vaults in the structure itself and whenever you get less than 1500 score in the tetris game.

basically those are shurikens in minecraft, they are quite slow and deal low damage. **BUT**, they dont have hit cooldown so they are great for getting mobs/players move away.

cheats:

```
function tetris:shuriken/give
```

</details>

<details>
<summary>The size changer</summary>
You can only get it once u get move than 1500 score in the tetris game.
(in the future i'll buff this wand by making it also give speed/strength based on the height and also add more wands)

Right click to grow, Shift right click to shrink. nothing too crazy

cheats:

```
loot give @s loot tetris:reward/1500..
```

</details>
</details>
